/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/core/Input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/core/Time.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/ecs/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/ecs/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/graphics/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/graphics/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/graphics/Sprite.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/world/Tilemap.cpp.o -o engine  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so -lSDL2_image
